# 01 — Connect WebSocket provider in YjsContext

Status: ready-for-agent
Labels: enhancement

*This was generated by AI during triage.*

## What

`YjsContext.tsx:38` hardcodes `provider: null`. `wsProvider.ts` exports `createWsProvider` but it is never called. Without this, no two users can sync — Yjs is running entirely in-memory per tab.

## Requirements

- Call `createWsProvider(roomName, doc, awareness)` inside `YjsProvider` and assign it to `provider`
- The provider must be created after `doc` and `awareness` are ready (already the case in the current `useMemo`)
- Destroy the provider in the existing cleanup `useEffect` (already has `value.provider?.destroy()`, just needs the provider to not be null)
- `roomName` is already threaded through as a prop — use it directly

## Context

- `src/lib/YjsContext.tsx` — `YjsProvider` component; `provider` is set to `null` at line 38
- `src/lib/wsProvider.ts` — `createWsProvider(roomName, doc, awareness)` returns a `WebsocketProvider`; uses `VITE_WS_URL` env var (defaults to `ws://localhost:4444`)

## Depends on

- Issue 02 (WS UUID mismatch) — the `roomName` passed here must be the backend UUID, not the URL-readable ID, or the relay will reject the connection. Do this issue last, or wire it with a placeholder and revisit after #02 is done.

## Files

- `src/lib/YjsContext.tsx` (frontend repo)
